topMarkets.growthNote: Capacity set to explode 6x to 400 MW by 2030

keyDrivers.detail: AI workloads require higher power density and advanced cooling; McKinsey projects 70% of incremental DC growth tied to AI
40+ African countries have data protection laws; 19 ratified Malabo Convention; localisation requirements driving in-country builds
2Africa, Equiano, PEACE, and Google's Africa-Australia cable expanding bandwidth and reducing latency
Power overtaking connectivity as biggest constraint; operators turning to PPAs, solar, geothermal — DCs as anchor customers for grid investment
AWS, Azure, Google Cloud, Oracle expanding African footprints; all major cloud providers now have or plan Africa regions
DFIs (IFC, US DFC, Proparco) de-risking Africa DC investments; $60B Africa AI Fund as catalytic vehicle

keyRisks.detail: Reliable electricity is the #1 constraint; many markets depend on diesel backup, adding $0.15–0.30/kWh to OPEX
54 countries with varying data protection, permitting, and investment frameworks increase complexity
Shortage of DC engineers, cooling specialists, and cybersecurity professionals; brain drain ongoing
Most African currencies volatile against USD; long-term PPA and lease pricing exposed to FX movements
SA + Nigeria + Kenya hold ~65% of capacity; secondary markets underdeveloped

events.name: GITEX Africa 2026
events.subtitle: Smart Data Centres Africa Programme
events.description: Africa's largest tech conference featuring a dedicated 'Smart Data Centres Africa' programme positioning DCs as critical digital infrastructure.
events.relevance: Hyperscaler announcements, policy showcases, Oracle Morocco launch momentum

events.name: Pan African DataCentres Exhibition & Conference
events.subtitle: PADCE 2026
events.description: Dedicated DC sector exhibition covering investment, construction, power, cooling, and connectivity for the African market.
events.relevance: SA investment pipeline showcase; Equinix, Teraco, Vantage, ADC expected

events.name: Africa Energy Week 2026
events.subtitle: Data Centres & Power Markets
events.description: Energy sector event with new track on how data centres are reshaping African power markets — DCs as anchor customers for grid investment.
events.relevance: PPA structuring, renewable integration, DC-as-grid-anchor business model

events.name: AfricaCom / Africa Tech Festival 2026
events.subtitle: Digital Infrastructure & Cloud Summit
events.description: Africa's premier connectivity and digital infrastructure event — cloud, edge compute, fibre, and DC investment tracks.
events.relevance: Telco-DC convergence, edge DC roll-out, 5G infrastructure

events.name: Africa Declaration on AI — Kigali
events.subtitle: $60B Africa AI Fund Announcement
events.description: African Union adopted the Africa Declaration on AI with commitments to sovereign compute, regional AI hubs, and $60B Africa AI Fund.
events.relevance: Foundational policy for sovereign AI DC investment across the continent

events.name: DCD>Connect Africa 2025
events.subtitle: Data Centre Construction & Design
events.description: DataCentre Dynamics event focused on DC construction, design, and operations for the African market.
events.relevance: Construction pipeline, cooling innovation, SA market deep-dive

events.name: East Africa Data Centre Summit 2025
events.subtitle: Nairobi DC Investment Forum
events.description: Regional summit covering East Africa DC investment, geothermal power integration, and sovereign cloud strategies.
events.relevance: Microsoft/G42 progress update, iXAfrica DC2 launch, Oracle Kenya region

events.name: ADCA Annual Conference 2026
events.subtitle: Data Centres in Africa — The Economic Report Launch
events.description: Africa Data Centres Association launched the 2026 Economic Report covering 220–230 facilities across 38 countries.
events.relevance: Benchmark data, capacity metrics, policy advocacy
